text: Tiny clarification before you touch anything: if the same id appears later with a different type, the first event wins. We do not recategorize it.
So if a1 is click first and purchase later, we keep click and ignore the later line entirely?
Exactly. Just say how you'd keep that straight for now. No code change yet.
Makes sense. I was about to wonder if we need a map from id to type, but I think the current seen set is enough for that behavior.
